ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "agreement_title" TEXT /* Title of the agreement */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "contract_value" TEXT /* Value of the contract */,
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract type */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Primary department responsible for the contract */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the contract */,
  "payment_terms" TEXT /* Terms of payment */,
  "renewal_date" TEXT /* Date for contract renewal */,
  "renewal_status" TEXT /* Status of the renewal process */,
  "amendment_date" TEXT /* Date of the last amendment */,
  "amendment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the last amendment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the contract */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the contract */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_contract_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_type_id") REFERENCES contract_types ("contract_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the supplier */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "legal_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the supplier */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number */,
  "bank_name" TEXT /* Name of the bank */,
  "bank_account" TEXT /* Bank account number */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Supplier performance rating */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the supplier profile */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the supplier profile was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the supplier profile */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the supplier profile was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suppliers_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_types" (
  "contract_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract type */,
  "contract_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contract type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_departments" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id", "department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., contract manager, procurement officer) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user profile */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user profile was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the user profile */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user profile was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contract_versions" (
  "contract_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract version */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contract */,
  "document_name" TEXT /* Name of the contract document */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date the document was created */,
  "document_file" TEXT /* File path to the contract document */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the contract document */,
  "signed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who signed the document */,
  "signature_date" TEXT /* Date the document was signed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contract_versions_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
